steps.title: Identify What Information Must Be Included
steps.content: The student's goal requires naming the sculpture (Sister), indicating Catlett created it, and stating the year it was created (1973).

steps.title: Check Which Choice Supplies All Required Information
steps.content: D presents exactly this information: “Elizabeth Catlett created the bronze sculpture Sister in 1973.” Choices A, B, and C either cite an unrelated year (A) or omit the year entirely (B, C), failing to accomplish the stated goal. That matches choice D — D is correct.
